response.justification: The candidate shows well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with sustained TypeScript/Node.js and React work in production settings, direct hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matching the role's AI agent requirement, and a demonstrated testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks). Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and MySQL cover the infrastructure and database requirements. Gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python experience, and no stated experience with the specific test runners named in the stack, though the depth of general testing expertise mitigates this.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms, including high-scale systems
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, directly matching the role's AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering-quality practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed; Java experience appears limited and dated
Named testing tools (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly evidenced, though general testing depth is strong

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
